articles.title: DuckDuckGo's 'No AI' Search Traffic Climbs as Users Reject Google's AI Overhaul
articles.description: DuckDuckGo's 'No AI' search option gains popularity as users turn away from Google's AI-driven results. Privacy concerns drive this shift in search preferences.
articles.impact: DuckDuckGo's growth highlights user privacy priorities.

articles.title: Spotify just rolled out three new Premium features to completely change your playlists
articles.description: Spotify introduces new Premium features for playlist management, allowing users to create folders directly in the app. This enhances organization and accessibility for mobile users.
articles.impact: Spotify enhances user experience with new features.

articles.title: DualSense Edge Controllers Get $30 Price Cut During Days of Play
articles.description: DualSense Edge controllers receive a $30 discount during PlayStation's Days of Play sale. Both black and white models are included in this limited-time offer.
key_points: Part of Days of Play sale
articles.impact: Price cut boosts sales for PlayStation controllers.

articles.title: Xbox CEO Says The Company Needs To Be Making ‘Hard Choices’
articles.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma emphasizes the need for tough decisions as the company prepares for its summer showcase. Focus on Game Pass and strategic direction is highlighted.
articles.impact: Xbox's future hinges on strategic choices.

articles.title: Call of Duty series comes to Nintendo Switch 2
articles.description: Modern Warfare 4 launches on Nintendo Switch 2 on October 23, 2026, marking the return of Call of Duty to Nintendo. The game promises darker, more intense missions.
articles.impact: Call of Duty's return boosts Nintendo's game lineup.
